headlines.title: Hundreds of GPs tell BBC they have never refused a sick note over mental health concerns
headlines.description: The number of fit notes issued has been rising, with more than 11.2m approved in England last year.

headlines.title: Epstein used modelling agent to recruit girls, Brazilian women tell BBC
headlines.description: Modelling agent used businesses to recruit girls and arrange US visas to visit Jeffrey Epstein, Brazilian women tell BBC.

headlines.title: PM was warned of 'reputational risk' over Mandelson's Epstein links
headlines.description: Documents also suggest the peer explored the possibility of a £500,000 severance payment after being sacked as US ambassador.

headlines.title: Chris Mason: There may be no knockout blows from Mandelson files but it's far from over
headlines.description: This first digital document drop about the prime minister's decision to appoint Lord Mandelson as US ambassador is interesting, but not explosive.

headlines.title: 'It was the stuff of dreams' - Liza Tarbuck leaves Radio 2 Saturday show
headlines.description: Shaun Keaveny, host of The Rock Show, will stand in for her until the end of the end of the month.

headlines.title: Draper fights to 'mind-blowing' win over Djokovic
headlines.description: Jack Draper produces a superb fightback to beat Novak Djokovic and reach the Indian Wells fourth round - a result he believes could be "a real big moment" in his season.

headlines.title: Inquiry into student loans launched by MPs
headlines.description: The Treasury Committee will look at whether "the goalposts [have] been moved in a way which is unfair".

headlines.title: Social media firms asked to toughen up age checks for under-13s
headlines.description: Instagram, Snapchat, TikTok, YouTube and Roblox are among the platforms UK regulators say aren't putting children's safety at the heart of their products.

headlines.title: Head chef resigns from world-famous restaurant Noma amid abuse allegations
headlines.description: René Redzepi had previously apologised after ex-employees of the Danish restaurant accused him of creating a toxic work environment.

headlines.title: Wind warnings issued as colder weather and mountain snow forecast
headlines.description: Strong winds are likely across many parts of the UK and conditions are turning colder towards the end of the week.

headlines.title: Boy, 15, arrested after girl is stabbed at school
headlines.description: Sources tell the BBC that pupils had to hide under their desks as the incident unfolded.

headlines.title: Jeremy Bowen: Trump has called for an Iran uprising but the lessons from Iraq in 1991 loom large
headlines.description: The US president might learn that starting wars is much easier than ending them, writes the BBC's international editor.

headlines.title: What role has cyber warfare played in Iran?
headlines.description: Militaries are often cagey about their cyber activities. But the US has hinted at the role it has played.

headlines.title: Pete Hegseth brings combative style as face of Trump's war in Iran
headlines.description: The former Fox host projects an image of unapologetic frontman for the world's most powerful military.

headlines.title: 'Even under missiles we carry on living' - how young Iranians are coping with war
headlines.description: Iranians say they are sheltering at home and rarely venturing out on near-empty streets as the US-Israeli bombing campaign continues.

headlines.title: Oil price jumps despite deal to release record amount of reserves
headlines.description: It comes as Iranian attacks on ships intensify in the crucial Strait of Hormuz waterway.

headlines.title: My identity was stolen and someone is using it to catfish men - it's terrifying
headlines.description: For four years, Sasha-Jay’s photos have been stolen from social media to impersonate her online.

headlines.title: War in Ukraine spills into Hungarian election campaign
headlines.description: Hungary is going to the polls soon and Prime Minister Viktor Orbán has one public enemy in his sights - Ukraine's president.

headlines.title: The Papers: 'Starmer did ignore Epstein warnings' and 'Record oil release'
headlines.description: Thursday's papers all lead with files released on Lord Mandelson's vetting for the US ambassador role.

headlines.title: Why Namibia's green energy dream could be a red flag for penguins
headlines.description: A near pristine desert and coastal wilderness in Namibia could soon host a huge hydrogen production facility.

headlines.title: A 'weirdly rushed' appointment - and other key takeaways from Mandelson files
headlines.description: A batch of documents has revealed new details about the appointment of Lord Mandelson as ambassador.

headlines.title: What did we learn from China's biggest political meeting?
headlines.description: BBC correspondents give us their biggest takeaways from China's National People's Congress.

headlines.title: Volcanic fragments rain down as Hawaii's Kilauea volcano erupts
headlines.description: This eruption episode sent fragments made of ash, pumice, and pieces of volcanic glass into communities, forcing highway closures and the evacuation of tourists.

headlines.title: US launches probe into trading partners including the EU, China and India
headlines.description: The move comes weeks after the US Supreme Court struck down a key part of Trump's tariffs policies.

headlines.title: Where did fridge-carrying fundraiser's donations go?
headlines.description: Teesside charity's ex-staff question where donations were spent but its founder denies wrongdoing.

headlines.title: Kanye West ordered to pay $140K in Malibu mansion renovation lawsuit
headlines.description: A handyman had sought $1.7m (£1.267m) from the rapper over claims of unpaid work, medical expenses and being unfairly fired.

headlines.title: Missing Brazilian academic may have taken boat, UK police say
headlines.description: Police believe the last sighting of Vitoria Figueiredo Barreto was on CCTV just after midnight on 3 March in Brightlingsea.

headlines.title: Bodies of two Chinese backpackers found in Australian floodwaters
headlines.description: The pair had been reported missing on Tuesday after failing to reach their destination.

headlines.title: BBC News app
headlines.description: Top stories, breaking news, live reporting, and follow news topics that match your interests

headlines.title: Will War In Iran Really End "Very Soon"?
headlines.description: President Trump says Iran war will be over “very soon”.

headlines.title: Americanswers… on 5Live! Why is Trump’s White House comparing the war in Iran to a video game?
headlines.description: And how much is the war in Iran motivated by oil?

headlines.title: Celebrate the 25th anniversary of the tragic Parisian love story
headlines.description: A poet goes to Paris and has an affair with a courtesan of an underground club.

headlines.title: 'Premier League elite suffer rude awakening in Europe'
headlines.description: Chief football writer Phil McNulty examines the state of the Premier League after a disappointing week in Europe for all six of its clubs.

headlines.title: Most underrated player on the planet? Valverde steps up for Real
headlines.description: Jude Bellingham stood open mouthed in disbelief while Kylian Mbappe jumped out of his seat to celebrate as Real Madrid team-mate Federico Valverde scored a stunning hat-trick to sink Manchester City in their Champions League first-leg tie.

headlines.title: Draper fights to 'mind-blowing' win over Djokovic
headlines.description: Jack Draper produces a superb fightback to beat Novak Djokovic and reach the Indian Wells fourth round - a result he believes could be "a real big moment" in his season.

headlines.title: 'A furry ball of love' - meet Pickle, ParalympicsGB's 26th team member
headlines.description: Guide dog Pickle has been stealing the spotlight in Milan-Cortina.

headlines.title: Valverde's brilliant first-half hat-trick stuns Man City
headlines.description: Real Madrid's Federico Valverde scores a first-half hat-trick as the Spanish giants beat Manchester City 3-0 in their Champions League last-16 encounter at the Bernabeu.

headlines.title: McIlroy hopeful on Sawgrass defence after injury
headlines.description: Rory McIlroy says he hopes to be able to defend his Players Championship title at TPC Sawgrass after withdrawing from a tournament through injury last week.
